evals.prompt: Validate the implementation of the three-package-split plan at .prism/shared/plans/2026-03-01-three-package-split.md. All 20 phases should be complete.
evals.expected_output: A validation report saved to .prism/shared/validation/ with phase completion counts, automated test results, manual verification items, deviations table, and a PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL status.
expectations: Loads the plan and checks git log for recent commits
Runs git diff --stat to identify changes in scope
Verifies each phase by checking checkboxes AND reading actual code
Separates success criteria into Automated (with commands and results) and Manual tables
Documents any deviations in a structured table with Deviation/Reason/Impact columns
Presents a summary with Phases N/M, Automated N/M, Manual N/M, and overall Status

evals.prompt: Validate the implementation. The codebase-memory-mcp graph tools are available.
evals.expected_output: Validation report includes a Structural Validation Results section with dead code check, dependency integrity, and boundary violation checks using graph tools.
expectations: Includes a '## Structural Validation Results' section in the report
Runs search_graph with max_degree=0 and exclude_entry_points=true to check for dead code
Uses trace_call_path for modified functions to verify dependency integrity
Checks for boundary violations using search_graph with relationship=CALLS
Reports results of each structural check in a table format

evals.prompt: Validate the implementation. The codebase-memory-mcp is NOT available in this session.
evals.expected_output: Validation report skips structural validation with a note explaining why.
expectations: Does not attempt to call graph tools when codebase-memory-mcp is unavailable
Includes a note: 'Structural validation skipped: graph not indexed' or equivalent
Still completes all other validation steps (phases, automated, manual, deviations)
